title: Determining the Structure of Dynamic Factor Models
abstract: arXiv:2606.26142v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: We propose two procedures for determining the number of dynamic factors, extending Bai and Ng (2002) and Ahn and Horenstein (2013) to dynamic factor models where lagged factors may directly influence the observed variables. As an intermediate step, we develop a simple and computationally efficient alternating least squares algorithm that directly estimates the dynamic factors, rather than their static representations. By working with these direct estimates, our approach enables joint determination of the number of factors and the filter length. Our test is shown to be consistent under weaker conditions than those in Bai and Ng (2007) and Amengual and Watson (2007). We apply our procedures to estimate the number of primitive shocks in a large panel of US macroeconomic time series.

Title: Determining the Structure of Dynamic Factor Models
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26142v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: We propose two procedures for determining the number of dynamic factors, extending Bai and Ng (2002) and Ahn and Horenstein (2013) to dynamic factor models where lagged factors may directly influence the observed variables. As an intermediate step, we develop a simple and computationally efficient alternating least squares algorithm that directly estimates the dynamic factors, rather than their static representations. By working with these direct estimates, our approach enables joint determination of the number of factors and the filter length. Our test is shown to be consistent under weaker conditions than those in Bai and Ng (2007) and Amengual and Watson (2007). translated_title: 确定动态因子模型的结构
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26142v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们提出了两种确定动态因子数量的方法，将Bai和Ng（2002）以及Ahn和Horenstein（2013）的方法扩展到滞后因子可能直接影响观测变量的动态因子模型中。作为中间步骤，我们开发了一种简单且计算高效的交替最小二乘算法，该算法直接估计动态因子，而非其静态表示。通过使用这些直接估计，我们的方法能够同时确定因子数量和滤波器长度。我们的检验在比Bai和Ng（2007）以及Amengual和Watson（2007）更弱的条件下被证明是一致的。我们将这些方法应用于估计美国宏观经济时间序列大面板数据中的原始冲击数量。
tldr: 本文提出两种新方法，通过直接估计动态因子而非静态表示，并利用交替最小二乘算法，在更弱条件下同时确定因子数量和滤波器长度，从而扩展了现有动态因子模型的结构确定方法。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes two novel procedures that extend existing methods for determining dynamic factor model structure by directly estimating dynamic factors via an alternating least squares algorithm, enabling joint determination of factor numbers and filter lengths under weaker conditions.
